purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: HTTP/API observability completed. MISIS_Digital Student Support now has app-level HTTP request metrics, latency histogram, error-rate alerts, Promtail nginx 502 metric, promtail-web scrape target, Nginx502Spike and compact Grafana HTTP/API panels.

current_next_stage: Dockerization: containerize misis-digital-student-support-api while preserving external port 8080, logs volume and current Nginx/Prometheus/Promtail flow
